headline: Marriott (MAR) Up 9.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Marriott (MAR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Hilton Worldwide Stock: Is HLT Outperforming the Consumer Discretionary Sector?
summary: Hilton Worldwide has outperformed the Consumer Discretionary sector over the past year, and analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: How Marriott’s ResortPass Expansion And Steady Travel Demand At Marriott International (MAR) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In May 2026, ResortPass, Inc. announced an agreement with Marriott International to expand day-access spa and wellness offerings across participating Marriott properties, reflecting hotels’ growing use of local, non-overnight guests to boost revenue from existing amenities. At the same time, Marriott’s leadership highlighted broadly healthy travel demand, with leisure and group segments offsetting regional pressure in the Middle East where RevPAR fell sharply. Next, we’ll examine how...
